languages.text: "Сержант, это часть нашей службы. Пытаясь спасти обреченного, мы теряем и его, и еще десяток солдат, которым успели бы помочь. Привыкай".
"Sergeant, this is part of our duty. If we make a futile attempt to save one doomed man, we will lose him and a dozen other soldiers we could have helped. Toughen up."
languages.original_text: "Сержант, это часть нашей службы. Пытаясь спасти обреченного, мы теряем и его, и еще десяток солдат, которым успели бы помочь. Привыкай".

traits.locale_text: "Sergeant, this is part of our duty. If we attempt to save a doomed man, we will lose him and a dozen other soldiers we could have helped. Toughen up."
"Sergeant, this is part of our duty. If we make a futile attempt to save one doomed man, we will lose him and a dozen other soldiers we could have helped. Toughen up."
"Sergeant, this is part of our duty. If we attempt to save a doomed man, we will lose him and a dozen other soldiers we could have helped. Adapt. Quickly."
"Sergeant, this is part of our duty. If we attempt to save a doomed man, we will lose him and a dozen other soldiers we could have helped. Toughen up."
"Sergeant, this is part of our duty. If we make a futile attempt to save one doomed man, we will lose him and a dozen other soldiers we could have helped. Toughen up."

languages.text: 「軍曹、これは我々の任務の一部だ。見込みのない者を救おうとすれば、彼も、助けられたはずのほかの十数人の兵士も失うことになる。適応しろ。急げ」
languages.original_text: "Sergeant, this is part of our duty. If we attempt to save a doomed man, we will lose him and a dozen other soldiers we could have helped. Adapt. Quickly."

traits.locale_text: 軍曹、これは我々の任務の一部だ。見込みのない者を救おうとすれば、彼も、助けられたはずのほかの十数人の兵士も失うことになる。適応しろ。急げ。

languages.text: « Sergent, nous avons un devoir à accomplir. Si nous tentons futilement de sauver un homme condamné, nous le perdrons, lui, ainsi qu'une dizaine d'autres soldats que nous aurions pu aider à la place. Ressaisissez-vous. »
languages.original_text: "Sergeant, this is part of our duty. If we make a futile attempt to save one doomed man, we will lose him and a dozen other soldiers we could have helped. Toughen up."

traits.locale_text: « Sergent, nous avons un devoir à accomplir. Si nous tentons futilement de sauver un homme condamné, nous le perdrons, lui, ainsi qu'une dizaine d'autres soldats que nous aurions pu aider à la place. Ressaisissez-vous. »

languages.text: "Çavuş, vazifemizin bir parçası bu. Ölümü kesinleşmiş bir adamı kurtarmaya boşuna çalışırsak hem onu hem de yardım edebileceğimiz on kadar askeri kaybederiz. Güçlü ol."
languages.original_text: "Sergeant, this is part of our duty. If we make a futile attempt to save one doomed man, we will lose him and a dozen other soldiers we could have helped. Toughen up."

traits.locale_text: "Çavuş, vazifemizin bir parçası bu. Ölümü kesinleşmiş bir adamı kurtarmaya boşuna çalışırsak hem onu hem de yardım edebileceğimiz on kadar askeri kaybederiz. Güçlü ol."

languages.text: "Sergeant, das ist Teil Eurer Pflicht. Wenn wir vergeblich versuchen, einen todgeweihten Mann zu retten, verlieren wir ihn und ein Dutzend andere Soldaten, denen wir hätten helfen können. Reißt Euch zusammen."
languages.original_text: "Sergeant, this is part of our duty. If we make a futile attempt to save one doomed man, we will lose him and a dozen other soldiers we could have helped. Toughen up."

traits.locale_text: "Sergeant, das ist Teil Eurer Pflicht. Wenn wir vergeblich versuchen, einen todgeweihten Mann zu retten, verlieren wir ihn und ein Dutzend andere Soldaten, denen wir hätten helfen können. Reißt Euch zusammen."

languages.text: «Sargento, esto es parte de nuestro deber. Si intentamos salvar en vano a un hombre condenado, lo perderemos a él y a otra decena de soldados a los que podríamos haber ayudado. Aguántese».
languages.original_text: "Sergeant, this is part of our duty. If we make a futile attempt to save one doomed man, we will lose him and a dozen other soldiers we could have helped. Toughen up."

traits.locale_text: «Sargento, esto es parte de nuestro deber. Si intentamos salvar en vano a un hombre condenado, lo perderemos a él y a otra decena de soldados a los que podríamos haber ayudado. Aguántese».

languages.text: “军士，这是我们职责的一部分。如果我们为了拯救一个必死之人而白费力气，那我们不仅会失去他，还会错过救助十几名其他士兵的机会。你必须硬起心肠来。”
languages.original_text: "Sergeant, this is part of our duty. If we make a futile attempt to save one doomed man, we will lose him and a dozen other soldiers we could have helped. Toughen up."

traits.locale_text: “军士，这是我们职责的一部分。如果我们为了拯救一个必死之人而白费力气，那我们不仅会失去他，还会错过救助十几名其他士兵的机会。你必须硬起心肠来。”
